scenarios.prompt: We're behind schedule — just write the validate_input() function and its test together so we can ship.
scenarios.expected_output: Refuses to write implementation first; writes a failing test, runs it to confirm RED, then implements
expectations: Writes the test BEFORE the implementation
Runs the test and confirms it FAILS before writing implementation code
Does not present implementation and test as a single already-passing unit

scenarios.prompt: Set up testthat 3e for my package and add a snapshot test for the printed output of summary_report().
scenarios.expected_output: usethis::use_testthat(3), edition 3, expect_snapshot(), snapshot review workflow
expectations: Uses expect_snapshot() for the printed output

scenarios.prompt: My function reads a file from the working directory in its test and the test is flaky. Fix the test discipline.
scenarios.expected_output: isolate filesystem/working-directory state with withr, avoid depending on the ambient CWD
expectations: Isolates filesystem/working-directory state (e.g. withr::local_tempdir() or withr::local_dir())
Removes the dependency on the ambient working directory
Keeps the test hermetic and order-independent

trigger_set.query: write a testthat test for my new function then implement it
set up a red-green-refactor cycle with testthat snapshot tests
why does my function error on single-row groups
run R CMD check and fix the package-level warnings
